network.title: Phoso ya Kgolagano
network.message: Ga go kgone go golagana le sebe. Tlhatlhoba kgolagano ya gago ya inthanete.
network.offline: Ga o a golagana le inthanete. Ditiro dingwe di ka nna tsa seka tsa dira sentle.
network.timeout: Nako ya kopo e fedile. Leka gape.

server.title: Phoso ya Sebe
server.message: Go na le phoso mo lehlakoreng la rona. Leka gape moragonyana.
server.maintenance: Sebe se a tlhokomelwa. Leka gape ka morago ga metsotso e se kae.
server.overload: Sebe se tshwerwe thata. Leka gape moragonyana.

auth.title: Phoso ya Netefatso
auth.unauthorized: Ga o a letlelelwa go dira tiro e.
auth.sessionExpired: Nako ya gago e fedile. Tsena gape.
auth.invalidCredentials: Nomoro ya mogala kgotsa khunolamaru ga e a siama.
auth.accountLocked: Akhaonto ya gago e notletswe. Ikgolaganye le kemonokeng.
auth.accountDisabled: Akhaonto ya gago e emisitswe. Ikgolaganye le kemonokeng.
auth.notVerified: Tswee tswee, netefatsa nomoro ya gago ya mogala ntlha.
auth.2faRequired: Go tlhokega netefatso ya dikgato tse pedi.
auth.2faInvalid: Khoutu ya netefatso ya dikgato tse pedi ga e a siama.

validation.title: Phoso ya Netefatso
validation.message: Tswee tswee, tlhatlhoba tshedimosetso e o e tsenyang mme o leke gape.
validation.minLength: {field} e tshwanetse go nna bonye ditlhaka tse {length}.
validation.maxLength: {field} e tshwanetse go nna bogolo ditlhaka tse {length}.
validation.email: Tswee tswee, tsena aterese ya imeile e e siameng.
validation.phone: Tswee tswee, tsena nomoro ya mogala e e siameng.
validation.url: Tswee tswee, tsena URL e e siameng.
validation.date: Tswee tswee, tsena letlha le le siameng.
validation.number: Tswee tswee, tsena nomoro e e siameng.
validation.integer: Tswee tswee, tsena palogotlhe e e siameng.
validation.positive: Tswee tswee, tsena nomoro e e kwa godimo ga lefela.
validation.unique: {field} e tshwanetse go nna e e kgethegileng.

notFound.title: Ga e a Fitlhelwa
notFound.resource: Se o se batlang ga se a fitlhelwa.

permission.title: Tetla e Gantswe
permission.message: Ga o na tetla ya go bona se.
permission.camera: Go gana go dirisa kh'hamera. Tswee tswee, letlelela kh'hamera.
permission.location: Go gana go dirisa lefelo. Tswee tswee, letlelela lefelo.
permission.storage: Go gana go dirisa polokelo. Tswee tswee, letlelela polokelo.
permission.notifications: Go gana go dirisa dikitsiso. Tswee tswee, letlelela dikitsiso.

data.title: Phoso ya Datha
data.save: Go boloka datha ga go atlega. Leka gape.
data.load: Go tsenya datha ga go atlega. Leka gape.
data.delete: Go phimola datha ga go atlega. Leka gape.
data.sync: Go kopanya datha ga go atlega. Leka gape.
data.conflict: Go lemogilwe kgotlhang ya datha. Rarabolola dikgotlhang.
data.offline: Ga o kgone go dira tiro e fa o sa golagana le inthanete.
data.offlineSave: Datha e bolokilwe mo lefelong. E tla kopanngwa fa o boela mo inthaneteng.

file.title: Phoso ya Faele
file.upload: Go tlhatlanya faele ga go atlega. Leka gape.
file.download: Go laola faele ga go atlega. Leka gape.
file.size: Bogolo jwa faele bo feta tekanyo.
file.type: Mofuta wa faele ga o a letlelelwa.

payment.title: Phoso ya Tefo
payment.failed: Tefo ga e a atlega. Leka gape.

unknown.title: Phoso e e sa Itseng
unknown.message: Go na le phoso e e sa solofelwang. Leka gape.
unknown.contact: Fa bothata bo tswelela, tswee tswee ikgolaganye le kemonokeng.
